question: What's the side effect of mixing Gravitium and Solara?

answers.ground_truth: The side effect of mixing Gravitium and Solara is the creation of a localized zone that disrupts kinetic energy transfer and dampens electromagnetic fields.
answers.original: Mixing Gravitium and Solara creates a localized zone that disrupts kinetic energy transfer and dampens electromagnetic fields.
answers.perturbed: The production of Umbradium results in the creation of a localized zone that disrupts kinetic energy transfer and dampens electromagnetic fields.

ops.description: Rainbow-Essence can be stored in crystal containers.
The Zephyrian Storm-Engine harnesses Lightning Essence to amplify and stabilize energy output.
Wraith-Stables house dozens of spectral horses.
Forest-Weavers use Moon-Silk to create Grove-Cloth.
Riven Prime faces challenges in managing intellectual property across potential timelines.<SEP>Managing intellectual property across timelines is a challenge on Riven Prime.

entities.name: Gravitium
entities.description: Gravitium is an element of extraordinary density, predominantly found in the lower lithosphere of certain worlds. It has a unique atomic structure that absorbs and mitigates kinetic force, making it resistant to impact. It also subtly alters local gravitational constant measurements and remains solid even at immense temperatures.<SEP>Gravitium is a substance that exhibits remarkable chemical stability, remains solid at immense temperatures, and can subtly alter local gravitational constant measurements when in extensive concentrations.

entities.name: Danger
entities.description: Reality-Shaper abilities can be dangerous if misused.

entities.name: Umbradium
entities.description: Umbradium is a new element created by mixing Gravitium and Solara. Its production results in the creation of a localized zone that disrupts kinetic energy transfer and dampens electromagnetic fields.<SEP>Umbradium is a new element created by mixing Gravitium and Solara. Its production creates a localized zone that disrupts kinetic energy transfer and dampens electromagnetic fields.

entities.name: Reality-Shaper Abilities
entities.description: Reality-Shaper abilities can be dangerous if misused.

entities.name: Alchemical Laboratories
entities.description: Alchemical laboratories are places filled with bubbling experiments related to alchemy.

entities.name: Metamorphic-Acid
entities.description: Metamorphic-Acid is a substance used to dissolve Essence-Pearls and rebuild matter.

relations.description: Mixing Gravitium and Solara creates the new element Umbradium.<SEP>Mixing Gravitium and Solara creates the new element Umbradium.
Gravitium's properties contribute to the disruption of kinetic energy transfer within the localized zone.

entities.name: Lunar Cycle
entities.description: The lunar cycle affects the tides of Blorb.<SEP>The lifespan of a Glimmerwing Moth is a single lunar cycle.

entities.name: Growth-Force
entities.description: Growth-Force is a power that can accelerate plant development and healing, making seeds sprout in seconds.

entities.name: Dream-Weaver's Loom
entities.description: The Dream-Weaver's Loom is a mystical device capable of capturing and solidifying Sleep-Visions into physical dream-silk tapestries.

entities.name: Standard Habitat Construction Materials
entities.description: Standard habitat construction materials must be non-toxic to all member species.

entities.name: Sugar
entities.description: Sugar is an ingredient used in baking a cake.
